closureNotes.outcome: T5 voxel group materialization + box_simulator_node + nav_msgs/OccupancyGrid producer + Maple Ridge bundle v1.1.0 group-definitions delivered via EB PR #323 squash-merged at 6924f97 on 2026-06-09 18:36:58 PDT. 11 NEW files authored at substrate-confirmed paths + 6 surgical modifications applied idempotently via V2 tarball PHASE 0-7 (apply.sh 20613 bytes, 8 phases). Coverage: box_simulator_node ROS 2 node with latched VoxelGroupArray @ 0.2Hz + VoxelGroupEvent on ADD/REMOVE + per-LEVEL OccupancyGrid @ 0.5Hz with opinionated PLANNED->0, IN_PROGRESS->50, BLOCKED->100, COMPLETE->0 mapping (DEC d-2026-06-09-opinionated-occupancy-mapping appended); Stage 4b voxel-groups intake stage with deterministic urn:luhtech:ectropy:voxel-group:sha256(project|type|key)[:12] derivation + ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE idempotency over 5 group types (LEVEL, ROOM, SYSTEM, TAKT_ZONE, DECISION_ZONE); GET /api/uro/voxel-groups read API with SSE /stream variant (15s heartbeat, 2s poll bridge) + UUID validation; Maple Ridge group-definitions.json seed (6 LEVELs + 3 ROOMs + 3 SYSTEMs + 3 TAKT_ZONEs + 1 DECISION_ZONE @ Grid B3); web-dashboard default DisplayRules matching T4 typed interface. Cross-repo flow F0B85LNSTC4: SR anchor PR #171 landed at SR main b4ef429862c20e14d4fcaa20b5320709e5d30a29 (2026-06-09); EB execution PR #323 merged at EB main 6924f97 (2026-06-09 18:36:58 PDT); SR closure (this TRUTH-DELIVERED) 2026-06-10. closureNotes.overrideRecord: Three substrate-vs-spec drift items resolved at EB execution time per memory #15 documented-override-not-compliance discipline (drifts captured here rather than silently bypassed; canonical paths used in execution; spec retained as authored-time artifact). (1) Intake stage service paths — spec scope said apps/api-gateway/src/services/intake/stage4-ifc.service.ts, stage5-takt.service.ts, stage6-decision.service.ts, voxel-groups-materializer.service.ts. Substrate at EB main b9b4141511f806b6746cc8bba0192253b3c06793 confirmed apps/api-gateway/src/intake/stages/stage-4-ifc.ts canonical layout (no /services/ sub-path; suffix .ts not .service.ts). Tarball wrote at substrate-confirmed apps/api-gateway/src/intake/stages/stage-4b-voxel-groups.ts and apps/api-gateway/src/intake/voxel-groups-materializer.ts. Stage 5/6 unmodified — spec called for tie-ins but substrate showed stage hooks already covered the materialization invocation path via Stage 4b. (2) ROS 2 launch file format — spec scope said infrastructure/uro-sim/colcon_ws/src/luhtech_uro_sim/launch/uro_sim.launch.py. Substrate confirmed existing launch file is XML (simulators.launch.xml). Tarball patched the .xml via apply.sh PHASE 4 (appended <node> element before </launch>) rather than authoring a new .py launch file. (3) Maple Ridge bundle version — spec title said 'Maple Ridge bundle v1.0.0' and outputs OUT-5 said 'authoring v1.0.0'. Substrate confirmed bundle already exists at v1.1.0 (post-2026-06-03 infra-hygiene arc). Tarball landed demo-library/maple-ridge/seed/group-definitions.json only against existing v1.1.0; did not author a v1.0.0 bundle root. T5 deliverable title and OUT-5 description still reference v1.0.0 as the authored-time artifact; bundle.json content was not modified.
